mapper.select: select distinct lower(table_name_en) as tableName, name as dataName, sum(table_all_count) as dataCount from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where primary_organization_ch ='原始库' and statistics_time >= to_date(#{dateStr},'yyyy-MM-dd') and secondary_organization_ch = #{name} group by lower(table_name_en),name

select tablename , tablename_ch as dataName, sum(records_all) as tableDataVolume from(select l.organization_type, l.sub_organization_name, l.tablename, l.tablename_ch , l.records_all,row_number() over(partition by organization_type||'_'||sub_organization_type||'_'||valvalue order by partition desc) rn from dgn_inspect_organization_stat l where organization_type = #{type} and sub_organization_name = #{searchName}) where rn = 1 and sub_organization_name is not null group by tablename,tablename_ch
